creator: frank@woodcruft.co.uk
text:
$ man ntpd                                                                                                
                                                                                                          
Problems. As in front of it in $MANPATH is:                                                               
                                                                                                          
/usr/share/man/man8/ntpd.8.gz                                                                             
                                                                                                          
and all the other man pages for ntpd from base.                                                            
                                                                                                          
I happened to realise what was happening, so I could have a look at man(1)                                
and:
                                                                                                          
$ man -M /usr/local/man: ntpd                                                                             
 
which prepends that path to $MANPATH and you then get to see the page from the port.                                                                                                         

I mentioned it on docs@ & was advised by Ben Kaduk that it merited a pr:

https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-doc/2020-May/034058.html
